queries.question: What is the description of the equipment that we have for every laboratory
queries.sql: SELECT Equipment.description  from Laboratory_Equipment join Equipment on Laboratory_Equipment.equipment_type_id = Equipment.id join Laboratory on Laboratory_Equipment.laboratory_id = Laboratory.id   GROUP BY Laboratory_Equipment.equipment_type_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Laboratory_Equipment.laboratory_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Laboratory)

queries.question: What is the description of the equipment that we have for every laboratory
queries.sql: select laboratory.name , equipment.description from Laboratory_Equipment join Equipment on Laboratory_Equipment.equipment_type_id = Equipment.id join Laboratory on Laboratory_Equipment.laboratory_id = Laboratory.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?laboratory_equipment a :Laboratory_Equipment .
  ?equipment a :Equipment .
  ?laboratory_equipment p:hasEquipment ?equipment .
  ?laboratory a :Laboratory .
  ?laboratory_equipment p:hasLaboratory ?laboratory .
  ?laboratory p:name ?name .
  ?equipment p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What is the type of equipment in common for all laboratories?
queries.sql: SELECT Equipment.type  from Laboratory_Equipment join Equipment on Laboratory_Equipment.equipment_type_id = Equipment.id join Laboratory on Laboratory_Equipment.laboratory_id = Laboratory.id   GROUP BY Laboratory_Equipment.equipment_type_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Laboratory_Equipment.laboratory_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Laboratory)

queries.question: For every laboratory, list the type and description of equipment they have.
queries.sql: select laboratory.name , equipment.type , equipment.description from Laboratory_Equipment join Equipment on Laboratory_Equipment.equipment_type_id = Equipment.id join Laboratory on Laboratory_Equipment.laboratory_id = Laboratory.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type ?description WHERE {
  ?laboratory_equipment a :Laboratory_Equipment .
  ?equipment a :Equipment .
  ?laboratory_equipment p:hasEquipment ?equipment .
  ?laboratory a :Laboratory .
  ?laboratory_equipment p:hasLaboratory ?laboratory .
  ?laboratory p:name ?name .
  ?equipment p:type ?type .
  ?equipment p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What type of equipment corresponds to each laboratory?
queries.sql: select laboratory.name , equipment.type from Laboratory_Equipment join Equipment on Laboratory_Equipment.equipment_type_id = Equipment.id join Laboratory on Laboratory_Equipment.laboratory_id = Laboratory.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?laboratory_equipment a :Laboratory_Equipment .
  ?equipment a :Equipment .
  ?laboratory_equipment p:hasEquipment ?equipment .
  ?laboratory a :Laboratory .
  ?laboratory_equipment p:hasLaboratory ?laboratory .
  ?laboratory p:name ?name .
  ?equipment p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: Show me the type and description of equipment each laboratory has.
queries.sql: SELECT Equipment.type, Equipment.description  from Laboratory_Equipment join Equipment on Laboratory_Equipment.equipment_type_id = Equipment.id join Laboratory on Laboratory_Equipment.laboratory_id = Laboratory.id   GROUP BY Laboratory_Equipment.equipment_type_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Laboratory_Equipment.laboratory_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Laboratory)
